title: Review CLI refactor for no-behavior-change signoff
description: Perform final review of the full refactor after implementation, migration, testing, and documentation are complete. Focus on public API preservation, extraction fidelity, import boundaries, and regression risk.
acceptance_criteria: Review confirms `agent_takt.cli` public entry points remain compatible, especially `main` re-export behavior.
Review checks that extraction stayed structural, with no unintended functional changes or circular-import regressions.
Review signoff references completed validation and documentation outcomes before marking the refactor ready.
